name: rubric rule schema validator emits a structured json output for downstream tooling consumption
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P1","semver":"1.0.0"}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"rule_id":"r"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
